title: Saudi Arabia has ramped up oil shipments through the Strait of Hormuz since U.S.-Iran deal
summary_full: Saudi Arabia is restarting its export logistics in the Persian Gulf after a three-month pause, according to Kpler.
summary_public: Saudi Arabia is restarting its export logistics in the Persian Gulf after a three-month pause, according to Kpler.

SA.label: positive
SA.evidence: Saudi Arabia has ramped up oil shipments through the Strait of Hormuz
